prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年最低位次约7622→6381→5188→4448→4867，整体呈前移趋势（位次数字减小），2021至2024年连续前移约3174名，2025年小幅后移约419名；2025年基准约4867名；本省计划2021年20人、2022年19人、2023年19人、2024年21人、2025年23人，逐年小幅增加；2026年物理类计划48人，较2025年大幅扩招约108.7%，招生名额翻倍，竞争显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第43名，近年排名持续上升（2021年50→2022年53→2023年49→2024年45→2025年43→2026年43），学校综合实力稳步提升，对优质生源吸引力增强；声誉平稳，无重大负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第27位，评价"较热"，综合热度约172万，短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，反映报考关注度有所升温；控制科学与工程获评A等级（第五轮学科评估），为该校王牌学科；相关自动化类、电子信息类、能源动力类专业社会热度高，对考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、能源动力等专业社会热度为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，与该校优势方向高度契合；甘肃省2026年物理类考生估算约14.6万人（按近年物理类占比约66.6%折算），较2025年12.1万人增长约20%，竞争加剧；学校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，属东北地区，对西北省份考生地域吸引力一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（23→48人，+108.7%）使竞争显著缓解、软科排名持续上升增强学校吸引力、甘肃省物理类考生增长约20%加剧竞争等多重因素，结合学校实力提升和考生规模增长做有限修正（位次数字略减小）。预测最低位次约7741名，区间7241-8241名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 能源与动力工程（兴海领军班）
- 软件工程（国家特软创新班）
- 海洋工程类（船舶与海洋工程、海洋机器人等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 航空航天类（飞行器设计与工程、飞行器动力工程等）
- 能源动力类（能源与动力工程、轮机工程）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程）
- 核化工与核燃料工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 新能源材料与器件
- 大数据管理与应用（不招单色异常考生）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7241-8241名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（7241以内）可重点冲刺一档的能源与动力工程（兴海领军班）和软件工程（国家特软创新班）；位次在区间中段以海洋工程类、航空航天类、电子信息类等二档专业为主；位次接近区间上限可优先考虑三档专业确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 7622 → 6381 → 5188 → 4448 → 4867, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a continuous forward shift of about 3174 places from 2021 to 2024, and a slight backward shift of about 419 places in 2025; the 2025 baseline is about 4867; the provincial plan was 20 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 23 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year; the 2026 Physics Category plan is 48, a significant expansion of about 108.7% compared to 2025, doubling the enrollment quota and significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 43rd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (2021: 50 → 2022: 53 → 2023: 49 → 2024: 45 → 2025: 43 → 2026: 43), steadily improving comprehensive strength and increasing appeal to high-quality students; stable reputation with no major negative public opinion incidents; ranked 27th in overall Douyin popularity, rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.72 million, indicating moderate to high exposure on short video platforms and reflecting rising attention from applicants; Control Science and Engineering received an A rating (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the university's flagship discipline; related majors such as Automation, Electronic Information, and Energy and Power are socially popular, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Energy and Power are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in social popularity, highly aligned with the university's advantageous directions; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province for 2026 is about 146,000 (converted based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 66.6%), an increase of about 20% from 121,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region, with generally average regional appeal to candidates from Northwest provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant expansion in 2026 (23 → 48, +108.7%) which greatly eases competition, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing the university's appeal, and the approximately 20% increase in Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province intensifying competition, with limited corrections based on the university's improved strength and candidate growth (slightly decreasing ranking numbers). The predicted minimum ranking is about 7741, with a range of 7241-8241.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Xinghai Leading Class)
- Software Engineering (National Special Software Innovation Class)
- Marine Engineering (Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Marine Robotics, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Aerospace (Aircraft Design and Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, etc.)
- Energy and Power (Energy and Power Engineering, Marine Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Nuclear Chemical Engineering and Nuclear Fuel Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- New Energy Materials and Devices
- Big Data Management and Application (does not admit candidates with single-color vision abnormalities)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7241-8241, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7241), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Energy and Power Engineering (Xinghai Leading Class) and Software Engineering (National Special Software Innovation Class); if your ranking is in the middle of the range, prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Marine Engineering, Aerospace, and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, consider Tier 3 majors first to ensure admission.
